summary: Phase 2 testing completed. Fixed critical white screen bug caused by babel plugin infinite recursion. Backend APIs fully functional (21/21 tests passed). Frontend now loads correctly with Ukrainian localization and all Phase 2 components.

fixed_issues.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 520 responses
fixed_issues.fix: Added ObjectId removal before returning achievement data

fixed_issues.issue: Infinite recursion in babel plugin causing white screen and compilation failure
fixed_issues.fix: Disabled visual-edits babel plugin in craco.config.js to prevent recursion
fixed_issues.impact: CRITICAL - Was blocking entire frontend from loading

passed_tests: White screen bug fix - frontend now loads correctly
All Phase 2 backend APIs (21/21 tests passed):
- Quests CRUD operations (create, complete steps, delete)
Task completion with XP/coins rewards and achievements
Level up system with stat points allocation
Feature unlocking at level 3 (habits/quests tabs locked correctly)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (white screen fixed, all core functionality working)

action_item_for_main_agent: Phase 2 implementation is working excellently! The critical white screen bug has been fixed. All backend APIs are functional. The babel plugin issue was resolved by disabling visual-edits in development. Consider re-enabling visual-edits plugin after fixing the infinite recursion in babel-metadata-plugin.js if visual editing features are needed.
